PicklePlex — Membership Dashboard

Standardized membership groups · primary metric Active · latest snapshot —

Trend over time

Sum of the selected metric across the current location & type filter. Each location is carried forward to its most recent snapshot so differing snapshot days don't create false dips.

Latest by location

Green = grew vs prior week, red = shrank, orange = Not Yet Open (pre-opening), purple = no prior week.

Membership families by location

Stacked bars show the four paid families. Free / Hourly is excluded from the chart (its scale is far larger) — see the table for those figures. “(Network)” memberships are excluded from every family.

Breakdown by location & membership group — week over week

Location / Membership group Active Prior Δ Δ %
▲ grew   ▼ shrank   — no change   ·   click a location row to expand its membership groups · click column headers to sort. “New” = group had no members in the prior snapshot.
